skills.name: Energy Bolt
skills.description: Gather powerful magical energy to launch it towards an enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Lethargy
skills.effect_text:
Physical Attack: - CaptionRatio %
Magic Attack: - CaptionRatio %
Evasion: - CaptionRatio2 %
Damage from Magic Circles and Continuous Area Effect attacks: + CaptionRatio3 %
[Lethargy] duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Magic Shield
skills.description: Create a protective shield around you that absorbs enemy attacks.
skills.effect_text:
Reduces CaptionRatio % of the incoming damage
Duration: CaptionRatio2 minutes
Consumes CaptionRatio3 % of the maximum SP for every attack defended against.

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.description: Inflicts damage on an enemy by creating a powerful earthquake. Hits twice against enemies under the effect of [Lethargy] debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Magic Missile
skills.description: Attack continuously with magic bullets. New bullets are shot if it successfully targets an enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Bullet Count: 5

skills.name: Teleportation
skills.description: Teleport to a random location. Use the arrow keys to choose the direction of the teleportation and the threat level from some monsters that the player was targeted by is reset after the skill is used.

attributes.name: Wizard: AoE
attributes.description:
* AoE Ratio +6

* Group attribute with [Wizard: Haste]

attributes.name: Wizard: Haste
attributes.description:
* Casting Time -50%

* Group attribute with [Wizard: AoE]

attributes.name: Energy Bolt: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Energy Bolt] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Earthquake: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Earthquake] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Magic Missile: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Magic Missile] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Earthquake: Remove Knockdown
attributes.description:
* Removes knockdown of [Earthquake]

Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Magic Shield: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Magic Shield]'s magic damage taken reducing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Lethargy: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases [Lethargy]'s physical and magic attack decreasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Lethargy: Enchant Lethargy
attributes.description:
* The caster receives [Enchant Lethargy] buff when casting [Lethargy]

* 1% chance per attribute level to apply [Lethargy] to enemies upon attack

Duration: 30 minutes

* Cannot be used along with [Enchant Slow]

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: [Arts] Teleportation: Return
attributes.description:
* Using [Teleportation] a second time within 2 seconds returns you to the position you were at before using [Teleportation].

* Is not affected by the attribute [Psychokino: Teleportation].

attributes.name: [Arts] Energy Bolt: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Energy Bolt] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Earthquake: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Earthquake] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Magic Missile: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Magic Missile] by 1.25% per attribute level
